tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvement Phase II
tool_args.raw_text: The LIRR is advancing the Jamaica Capacity Improvement (JCI) Phase II project. JCI is a transformative project that will increase train throughput and decrease travel times for LIRR passengers traveling through Jamaica, lengthen all existing Jamaica Station platforms, upgrade Jamaica's rail systems, and implement a state-of-good-repair to all infrastructure within the project limits.

payload.description: Transformative project to increase train throughput and decrease travel times for LIRR passengers traveling through Jamaica, lengthen existing Jamaica Station platforms, upgrade Jamaica's rail systems, and implement state-of-good-repair to all infrastructure within the project limits.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Bus Depot Reconstruction Project
tool_args.raw_text: The Project will both reconstruct and expand JBD to manage the operation, maintenance, and on-site storage for up to 272 Standard Bus Equivalents... infrastructure support for the operation and maintenance of an entirely zero-emissions bus fleet with a minimum of 60 electric buses assigned to the depot immediately upon completion of the Project.

payload.description: Reconstruct and expand the Jamaica Bus Depot to manage operation, maintenance, and on-site storage for up to 272 Standard Bus Equivalents, including 15 maintenance bays, infrastructure for a zero-emissions bus fleet with minimum 60 electric buses, and LEED certification.

tool_args.label: OMNY - New Fare Payment System
tool_args.raw_text: OMNY support activities including program management and oversight, consulting support for additional field installations, system design reviews, rollout and testing, integration with the commuter railroads, and fare policy and analysis.

payload.project_name: New Fare Payment System – One Metro New York (OMNY)
payload.description: Account-based, open-payment system allowing customers to pay fares using mobile apps, digital wallets, contactless bank cards, and MTA-issued contactless transit cards. Includes Configurable Vending Machine (CVM) deployment and software/hardware enhancements for Metro-North, LIRR, and NYC Transit.

tool_args.label: TBTA PMT Green Bonds Series 2022E Issuance
tool_args.raw_text: On November 1, 2022, MTA issued $700.200 million of Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Green Bonds, Series 2022E (Climate Bond Certified).

payload.description: Issued $700.200 million of Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Green Bonds, Series 2022E (Climate Bond Certified)

tool_args.label: EAM Contract Extension Approved by Committee
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee voted to recommend the procurement item before the Board for approval.

payload.description: Committee voted to recommend the procurement item for Enterprise Asset Management contract extension before the Board for approval

tool_args.label: Kawasaki Subway Car Option Exercise
tool_args.raw_text: the exercise of a federally funded option to purchase additional 640 subway cars from Kawasaki Rail Car Inc., which will replace R46 cars on several subway lines. The estimated amount is $1.8 billion, and the delivery of the cars is anticipated from February 2025 through December 2026.

payload.description: Exercise of federally funded option to purchase additional 640 subway cars from Kawasaki Rail Car Inc. to replace R46 cars. Estimated amount $1.8 billion, delivery anticipated February 2025 through December 2026.

tool_args.label: CBDTP Funds Restricted to Capital
tool_args.raw_text: the funds that will be received from the CBDTP are restricted to capital, so the implementation of the program does not affect the operating budget

payload.claim_text: The funds that will be received from the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP), also known as congestion pricing, are restricted to capital, so the implementation of the program does not affect the operating budget.
payload.subject: Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP)
payload.description: Chair Zuckerman clarified that CBDTP funds are restricted to capital per State Public Authorities Law §553-J

tool_args.label: CH2M Hill OMNY Support Extension
tool_args.raw_text: the item is a modification to the existing contract for consulting services for NYCT's New Fare Payment System, known as OMNY. The modification will add a three-year extension from November 1, 2022 through October 31, 2025 and provide additional funding in the amount of approximately $13.5 million.

payload.claim_text: CH2M Hill NY, Inc. modification will add a three-year extension from November 1, 2022 through October 31, 2025 and provide additional funding of approximately $13.5 million for OMNY support activities.
payload.subject: CH2M Hill NY, Inc.
payload.description: Extension for OMNY support including program management, oversight, field installations, system design reviews, rollout and testing, integration with commuter railroads, and fare policy and analysis.

tool_args.label: Scheidt & Bachmann Fare System Extension
tool_args.raw_text: the final item is a three-year extension of an existing miscellaneous service contract with Scheidt & Bachmann Fare Collection System GmbH to continue comprehensive maintenance and support services to Metro-North and LIRR's ticket selling systems and equipment. Additional funds of approximately $14.1 million will be added and the extension is from January 1, 2023 through December 31, 2025.

payload.claim_text: Three-year extension of existing miscellaneous service contract with Scheidt & Bachmann Fare Collection System GmbH to continue comprehensive maintenance and support services to Metro-North and LIRR's ticket selling systems and equipment. Additional funds of approximately $14.1 million. Extension from January 1, 2023 through December 31, 2025.
payload.subject: Scheidt & Bachmann Fare Collection Systems GmbH
payload.description: Extension to align services with OMNY rollout schedule
